content:
graph LR
    subgraph "Degradation Mode Comparison"
        direction TB
        A["Interface Degradation"] -->|"Significant even without UV/humidity [1]"| B["Encapsulant-Substrate Bond"]
        C["Bulk Degradation"] -->|"Negligible without UV/humidity [1]"| D["Polymer Matrix"]
    end

    subgraph "Encapsulant Response to Higher Lamination Temperature [2]"
        direction TB
        E["EVA"] -->|"Improved"| F["Peel Force ↑"]
        E -->|"Improved"| G["Gel Content ↑"]
        H["POE"] -->|"Improved"| F
        H -->|"Improved"| G
    end

    subgraph "Aging Indicators [2]"
        direction TB
        I["Peel Test"] -->|"Mechanical adhesion"| L["Encapsulant Performance"]
        J["Gel Content"] -->|"Chemical aging"| L
        K["Yellowness Index"] -->|"Optical aging"| L
    end

    subgraph "Evidence Coverage"
        direction TB
        M["EVA ✓"] --- N["POE ✓"]
        O["TPO ?"] --- P["PEI ?"]
        Q["Polyolefin ?"] --- R["Surlyn ?"]
    end

    style A fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style C fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style E fill:#339af0,color:#fff
    style H fill:#339af0,color:#fff
    style M fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style O fill:#fcc419,color:#333
    style P fill:#fcc419,color:#333
    style Q fill:#fcc419,color:#333
    style R fill:#fcc419,color:#333
